creator: obrien@cs.ucdavis.edu
text:
timed(8)'s manpage states:


	"network running timed 8." and "When timed 8 is started"

Fix: 

Shouldn't that be "network running timed(8)."  or just "running timed."?
	I see that ".Nm timed 8 ." is used.  Should that be ".Xr timed 8"?  But
	of course that won't bold it.

	What is the correct way for this?
How-To-Repeat: 
	``man timed''
